list.vod_blurb: A dangerous game, full of traps. A dispute of power, money and desire. On one side of the board, del
list.vod_content: A dangerous game, full of traps. A dispute of power, money and desire. On one side of the board, delegate Giovanna Torres, on the other, the wife of a businessman, Maya Manoela. In this game, only one will fall. Who will give Checkmate?

list.vod_blurb: Ona and Saule are best friends and passionate cooks who are stuck working at "Tasty", a lo
list.vod_content: Ona and Saule are best friends and passionate cooks who are stuck working at "Tasty", a local canteen. Ona is a single mother and Saul? is an enthusiastic girl from the countryside. One day, Saul? enrols them in a national TV cooking competition, which offers a restaurant as the grand prize. Without Ona's consent, she lies about their culinary experience. Reluctantly, Ona gives in to Saul?â€™s lies and they both manage to enter the competition. Despite being viewed as a joke, their popularity skyrockets on social media. As Ona becomes the audienceâ€™s favourite, tension between the friends escalates as itâ€™s fuelled by the show's manipulative celebrity contestant, Brukn?. Ona even starts dating a French jury member, adding to the friction. Will their friendship survive the intense pressure of the competition?
